title: notifications-mail — scheduled tasks
description: Two entries: reconcile-suppressions weekly + prune-expired-suppressions daily.

entries.name: reconcile-suppressions
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 04 UTC: pull provider-side suppression lists via each provider's API + sync missing entries. Belt-and-braces for missed webhooks.

entries.name: prune-expired-suppressions
entries.purpose: Daily 03:30 UTC: soft-delete suppression rows where expires_at < now(). Applies to soft-bounces + provider-imposed temporary blocks. Never touches hard_bounce / complaint / manual / spam_trap.
